a:r.a:t: TCC for the majority of sales positions are falling
below market median, with the majority aligned to the 25
HGV’s sales executives are the most competitive to market TCC,
percentile for action line, and well above the 75
Similar to the vacation ownership industry,
training roles are typically not on sales plans
and therefore have a base-heavy pay mix.
frontline sales roles typically align to a 50/50 to 60/40 pay mix
, with new business roles skewing more variable-heavy than existing business roles.
In the broader market, sales management roles are typically more base-heavy (~70/30)
to reinforce focus on leadership, coaching, and team performance over individual selling.
Skilled Sales Professional (Blend of New and Existing Business)
